description: Research archive for Steven Woods' Software Engineering Institute period in Pittsburgh, covering publications, institute context, and startup-transition material.
person_context: Steven Woods worked at the Software Engineering Institute in Pittsburgh from 1998 to 1999; this project is the deep archive for that period.
focus_value: SEI papers, staff context, and transition-to-startup material
current_focus: SEI papers, staff context, and transition-to-startup material
